title: Supply Chain Manager - Evergreen India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Evergreen India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Evergreen India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Evergreen India:
Evergreen India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evergreen India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
